name: checkbox
title: Checkbox
description: Bare checkbox primitive. Converted from shadcn ui/checkbox.tsx (base-ui Checkbox.Root/Indicator) to rung-1 pure CSS — appearance-none input + peer-checked sibling check-mark SVG, zero JS. Unlabelled building block for compositions outside FormField.astro.

files.content: --- /** * Checkbox.astro -- astro-shad bare checkbox primitive. Converted from * shadcn ui/checkbox.tsx (base-ui Checkbox.Root/Indicator). Rung 1: a * real `` with `appearance-none` styling plus a * sibling check-mark SVG shown via the `peer`/`peer-checked:` CSS * selector -- base-ui's Root/Indicator split existed to sync a "checked" * data-attribute to a rendered child; the browser already tracks * `:checked`, so that's the whole mechanism, zero JS. * * This is the unlabelled building block -- `FormField.astro`'s * `type="checkbox"` renders its own inline markup (it needs the * label/description/error wiring); reach for this one when composing a * checkbox outside FormField (e.g. a filter list, a sidebar toggle row). * * * */ import { cn } from '../../lib/utils'; interface Props { checked?: boolean; class?: string; [key: string]: unknown; } const { checked, class: className, ...rest } = Astro.props; ---
